---
# title: "Publications"
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

## Publications

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import os, re, yaml
from html import unescape

pub_dir = "./publication"

def parse_pub(fname):
    with open(os.path.join(pub_dir, fname)) as f:
        content = f.read()
    m = re.match(r'^---\n(.*?)\n---\n?(.*)', content, re.DOTALL)
    if not m:
        return None
    fm = yaml.safe_load(m.group(1))
    fm['_fname'] = fname
    return fm

pubs = []
for fname in os.listdir(pub_dir):
    if fname.endswith('.qmd'):
        p = parse_pub(fname)
        if p:
            parts = fname.split('-')
            try:
                p['_month'] = int(parts[1])
                p['_day'] = int(parts[2])
            except (IndexError, ValueError):
                p['_month'] = 0
                p['_day'] = 0
            pubs.append(p)

pubs.sort(key=lambda x: (int(x.get('year', 0)), x.get('_month', 0), x.get('_day', 0)), reverse=True)

theses = [p for p in pubs if re.search(r'thesis', p.get('venue', ''), re.IGNORECASE)]
journals = [p for p in pubs if not re.search(r'thesis', p.get('venue', ''), re.IGNORECASE)]

from collections import defaultdict
by_year = defaultdict(list)
for pub in journals:
    by_year[int(pub.get('year', 0))].append(pub)

counter = 1
for year in sorted(by_year.keys(), reverse=True):
    year_pubs = by_year[year]
    print(f'<h3>{year}</h3>')
    print(f'<ol start="{counter}" style="padding-left:1.5rem;">')
    for pub in year_pubs:
        cit = unescape(pub.get('recommended_citation', pub.get('citation', pub.get('title', ''))))
        title = unescape(pub.get('title', ''))
        slug = pub.get('_fname', '').replace('.qmd', '')
        url = f'publication/{slug}.html' if slug else ''

        if url and title:
            cit_html = cit.replace(title, f'<a href="{url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{title}</a>', 1)
        else:
            cit_html = cit

        print('<li style="padding:0.4rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;">')
        print(f'<div class="pub-citation">{cit_html}</div>')
        print('</li>')
        counter += 1
    print('</ol>')

# PhD Thesis section
if theses:
    print('<h3>PhD Thesis</h3>')
    print('<ul style="padding-left:0;list-style:none;">')
    for pub in theses:
        cit = unescape(pub.get('recommended_citation', pub.get('citation', pub.get('title', ''))))
        title = unescape(pub.get('title', ''))
        slug = pub.get('_fname', '').replace('.qmd', '')
        url = f'publication/{slug}.html' if slug else ''
        if url and title:
            cit_html = cit.replace(title, f'<a href="{url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">{title}</a>', 1)
        else:
            cit_html = cit
        print('<li style="padding:0.4rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;">')
        print(f'<div class="pub-citation">{cit_html}</div>')
        print('</li>')
    print('</ul>')
```

:::

:::
